---
title: "DS4420 Developer Distrust Project - Bayes"
author: "Gavin Bond"
date: "'r Sys.Date()"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
options(mc.cores = min(4, parallel::detectCores()))
```

Necessary imports:
```{r}
library(brms)
library(ggplot2)
```

Initial data import (2 survey years combined)
```{r}
df <- read_csv("data/combined_survey.csv")

```


```{r}


```
